intro.title: How this works
intro.description: This integration manages Google Assistant and overrides any `google_assistant:` section in your configuration.yaml. You can export or import a standalone YAML config later from Settings → Voice assistants.

data_description.migrate_yaml: Copies exposure, state reporting, PIN, and aliases. Uncheck to start fresh.

credentials.title: Google Assistant (Manual)
credentials.description: Enter your Google Cloud project ID. See the setup guide at {guide_url} (steps 1-13).

service_account.title: Service Account
service_account.description: Paste your service account JSON key. Create one at {docs_url} (guide step 12).

error.invalid_project_id: Project ID must be 6-30 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens
error.Invalid JSON: The text is not valid JSON
error.Missing 'client_email': The JSON is missing the 'client_email' field
error.Missing 'private_key': The JSON is missing the 'private_key' field
